# Generated by tools/generate_stellar_ai_nomad_waystation_budgets.py.
# Pegasus 4.4.4 full-object Nomad Waystation budget overrides.
# Threat halves funding weight instead of disabling Waystations; native
# technology, resource-model, cost, and starbase-capacity controls remain.

influence_expenditure_megastructures_waystations = {
	resource = influence
	type = expenditure
	category = megastructures_waystations


	weight = {
		weight = 0.3

		# Waystations use starbase capacity. Reduce budget when over capacity.
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			used_starbase_capacity_percent >= 1
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.1
			used_starbase_capacity_percent >= 1.25
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			used_starbase_capacity_percent >= 2.0
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			highest_threat >= 50
		}
	}

	desired_min = {
		base = @waystation_cost_influence_100
	}

	desired_max = {
		base = @waystation_cost_influence_100
	}

	potential = {
		is_nomadic = yes
		has_technology = tech_waystation_1
	}
}

alloys_expenditure_megastructures_waystations = {
	resource = alloys
	type = expenditure
	category = megastructures_waystations


	weight = {
		weight = 0.4

		# Waystations use starbase capacity. Reduce budget when over capacity.
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			used_starbase_capacity_percent >= 1
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.1
			used_starbase_capacity_percent >= 1.25
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			used_starbase_capacity_percent >= 2.0
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			highest_threat >= 50
		}
	}

	desired_min = {
		base = @waystation_cost_alloys_250
		modifier = {
			mult = 0.5
			country_uses_bio_ships = yes
		}
	}

	desired_max = {
		base = @waystation_cost_alloys_250
		modifier = {
			mult = 0.5
			country_uses_bio_ships = yes
		}
	}

	potential = {
		is_nomadic = yes
		has_technology = tech_waystation_1
	}
}

food_expenditure_megastructures_waystations = {
	resource = food
	type = expenditure
	category = megastructures_waystations


	weight = {
		weight = 0.4

		# Waystations use starbase capacity. Reduce budget when over capacity.
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			used_starbase_capacity_percent >= 1
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.1
			used_starbase_capacity_percent >= 1.25
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			used_starbase_capacity_percent >= 2.0
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			highest_threat >= 50
		}
	}

	desired_min = {
		base = @waystation_cost_alloys_500
		modifier = {
			mult = @halved_alloy_to_food_cost_ratio
		}
	}

	desired_max = {
		base = @waystation_cost_alloys_500
		modifier = {
			mult = @halved_alloy_to_food_cost_ratio
		}
	}

	potential = {
		is_nomadic = yes
		country_uses_bio_ships = yes
		has_technology = tech_waystation_1
	}
}
